caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Seas Target Grenada
caribbean.paragraph: Grenada is experiencing east winds up to 15 kt, seas to 5.4 ft with an E-dominant 7 s swell, and 100% rain probability at the port. I expect localized downpours and reduced visibility through today; St. Lucia is the runner-up with winds near 12 kt and lighter seas, so I advise mariners and port authorities to monitor local updates.

mediterranean.headline: Mykonos Sees 20 kt NE Winds, 3.9 ft Seas
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing NE winds up to 20 kt with seas to 3.9 ft and a short 5 s NE swell, and rain is less than 10% rain probability. I note Athens (Piraeus) is milder at 9 kt, and I advise mariners that conditions sit at the lower end of Small Craft Advisory thresholds for open-water craft despite the low rain chance.
